creator: peter@FreeBSD.org
text:
I think so, but it'll take a bit of research.

The caveat here is that things like the tools to generate auto ports PR's need to be dealt with too.  I'm not sure what the plan there is, but there are options ranging from email API to CLI wrappers etc.

I think the bugmeister folks envisioned people setting up auto-search / auto-notify filters but I'm not following the details here.
